text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 77 

SNF_MDCR_PMT 

LABEL: Skilled Nursing Facility Medicare Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total Medicare payments in the skilled nursing facility (SNF) setting for the year. 

The total Medicare payments for SNF are calculated as the sum of the CLM_PMT_AMT for all SNF claims 
where the CLM_PMT_AMT >= 0. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: SNF_MDCR_PMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH:
